issue_types.name: Screen Repair / Cracked Screen
issue_types.description: Cracked, shattered, or unresponsive touchscreen and display issues.

issue_types.name: Battery Replacement / Won't Hold Charge
issue_types.description: Battery drains quickly, won't charge to 100%, or device powers off unexpectedly.

issue_types.name: Charging Port / Won't Charge
issue_types.description: Phone won't charge, loose charging port, or intermittent charging connection.

issue_types.name: Back Glass / Rear Panel Repair
issue_types.description: Cracked or shattered rear glass or damaged back cover.

issue_types.name: Water / Liquid Damage
issue_types.description: Exposure to water or other liquids causing malfunction or no power.

issue_types.name: Camera Issues
issue_types.description: Blurry photos, camera app not opening, or rear/front camera not working.

issue_types.name: Speaker / Microphone Issues
issue_types.description: Low or no sound, callers can't hear you, or distorted audio.

protection_plans.name: Pixel 7 Accidental Damage Plan 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Covers up to two approved claims over 24 months with a per-claim service fee.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not cover loss, theft, or intentional damage.
protection_plans.description: Affordable 2-year Pixel 7 protection including drops, liquid damage, and mechanical failures.

protection_plans.name: Pixel 7 Accidental + Theft Plan 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Includes coverage for theft or loss with device replacement subject to a deductible.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not cover cosmetic-only damage or accessories.
protection_plans.description: Enhanced Pixel 7 protection with theft and loss coverage over 24 months.

protection_plans.name: Pixel 7 Premium Protection 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Unlimited approved claims for covered events with a low service fee per incident.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not cover loss, theft, or modifications made by non-authorized service centers.
protection_plans.description: Premium Pixel 7 protection with higher claim limits and priority service.

protection_plans.name: Pixel 7 Accidental Damage Plan 12 Months
protection_plans.terms: Covers one approved claim per 12-month term.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not include liquid damage or theft coverage.
protection_plans.description: 1-year Pixel 7 plan focused on accidental drops and screen damage.

protection_plans.name: iPhone 15 Accidental Damage Plan 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Two approved accidental damage claims per 12 months, plus extended warranty.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not cover loss, theft, or cosmetic damage that does not affect function.
protection_plans.description: Comprehensive 2-year protection plan for iPhone 15 including drops and spills.

protection_plans.name: iPhone 15 Extended Warranty 12 Months
protection_plans.terms: Extends manufacturer-style warranty coverage by 12 months.
protection_plans.exclusions: No coverage for accidental damage, liquid damage, loss, or theft.
protection_plans.description: Budget-friendly warranty extension for iPhone 15 hardware failures.

protection_plans.name: Galaxy S21 Accidental Damage Plan 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Covers up to two incidents of accidental damage, subject to service fees.
protection_plans.exclusions: Does not cover theft, loss, or unauthorized repairs.
protection_plans.description: 2-year Galaxy S21 plan focusing on drops, cracks, and liquid damage.

protection_plans.name: iPhone 13 Accidental Damage Plan 24 Months
protection_plans.terms: Includes extended warranty and accidental damage coverage with fixed service fees.
protection_plans.exclusions: Excludes loss, theft, and intentional damage.
protection_plans.description: Popular 2-year protection option for iPhone 13 owners.

quote_options.name: Galaxy S21 Mail-in Battery Service - Standard
quote_options.turnaroundTimeDescription: Standard 3–5 business days from the time your device is received.
quote_options.terms: Price includes parts, labor, and return shipping. Diagnosis is free if repair is declined.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Ship your Galaxy S21 in a padded box using the prepaid label sent after request confirmation.

quote_options.name: Galaxy S21 Mail-in Battery Service - Express
quote_options.turnaroundTimeDescription: Express 24-hour turnaround from the time your device is checked in.
quote_options.terms: Express queue with priority diagnostics and battery replacement. Limited to stock on hand.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Use the included express mailer kit; devices received by noon enter same-day processing.

quote_options.name: Galaxy S21 Mail-in Battery Service - Premium Care
quote_options.turnaroundTimeDescription: 24-hour turnaround with extended testing and cleaning.
quote_options.terms: Includes full diagnostics, battery calibration, and 90-day repair warranty.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Prepaid 2-day shipping both ways with insurance up to $800 included.

quote_options.name: Pixel 7 Mail-in Screen Repair - Standard
quote_options.terms: OEM-quality display parts with 6-month defect warranty.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Remove SIM card before shipping. Use the provided Pixel-safe shipping kit.

quote_options.name: Pixel 7 Mail-in Battery Replacement - Standard
quote_options.terms: New OEM-equivalent battery with 6-month warranty on the replaced part.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Ship with at most 30% battery charge in the padded mailer kit provided.

quote_options.name: iPhone 14 Mail-in Battery Service - Standard
quote_options.terms: Price includes diagnostics and calibration. If no fault found, a reduced fee applies.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Back up your iPhone before shipping. Use the tamper-evident box from the mail-in kit.

quote_options.name: iPhone 14 Mail-in Screen Repair - Standard
quote_options.terms: Includes parts, labor, sealing, and post-repair diagnostics.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Disable Find My before shipping and remove any cases or accessories.

quote_options.name: iPhone 13 Mail-in Back Glass Repair - Standard
quote_options.turnaroundTimeDescription: Standard 5–7 business day turnaround for back glass replacement.
quote_options.terms: Back glass replacement includes frame inspection; additional frame damage may incur added cost.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Use rigid packaging to avoid further cracking during transit.

quote_options.name: Galaxy S20 Mail-in Charging Port Repair - Standard
quote_options.turnaroundTimeDescription: Standard 4–5 business day turnaround including diagnostics.
quote_options.terms: Price covers cleaning and port replacement if required. Logic board damage may adjust quote.
quote_options.shippingInstructions: Include a brief description of symptoms and original charger if possible.
